title: Goldfish Growth Constraints
description: What factors influence the actual growth of goldfish, and how does tank size affect their development?
narrative: The user is seeking to understand the truth behind the common myth that goldfish grow to the size of their tank. They want to know whether tank size truly limits goldfish growth or if other factors, such as genetics, water quality, and space, play a more significant role. Relevance is determined by documents that clarify the relationship between tank size and goldfish growth, particularly those that explain stunting due to inadequate space, proper tank dimensions for adult goldfish, and the misconception that fish adapt their size to their environment. Documents discussing incompatible tank mates or general care tips without addressing growth limitations are not relevant.

title: US Entry into WWI

narrative: The user is seeking a nuanced understanding of the specific incidents and factors that prompted the United States to abandon its neutrality and enter World War I. title: Trapezoid Midsegment

narrative: The user is seeking a clear explanation of the midsegment of a trapezoid, including its definition, geometric properties, and method of calculation. Relevance is determined by documents that accurately describe the midsegment as the line segment connecting the midpoints of the non-parallel sides (legs) of a trapezoid, its relationship to the bases (being parallel and having a length equal to the average of the bases), and its role in calculating the area or other geometric properties. Documents that confuse the midsegment with other concepts such as the median of a triangle or discuss unrelated topics like chivalric orders or area formulas without connecting them to the midsegment are not relevant.
